lines.speaker: KAEL
lines.line: I don't get it, ARIA. The data's encrypted, and I need your expertise to crack it.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of KAEL, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: ARIA
lines.line: Give me a minute, Kael. This is some advanced stuff." VISUAL CUE: Close-up of ARIA, fingers flying across her console as her eyes scan lines of code.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of ARIA, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: ARIA
lines.line: I'm in. We've got a lead on the suspect's identity.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of ARIA, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: KAEL
lines.line: Who is it?" VISUAL CUE: Close-up of Kael, his cybernetic eye glowing bright blue as he leans forward, eager for answers.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of KAEL, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: ARIA
lines.line: Someone from the highest echelons of the corporation. Name of Victor Vex." VISUAL CUE: Medium shot of ARIA, her expression a mix of shock and concern.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of ARIA, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: KAEL
lines.line: Alright, ARIA. We're going in. Time to find out what Victor Vex knows." VISUAL CUE: Wide shot of Kael, his cybernetic eye glowing bright blue as he scans the building's exterior.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of KAEL, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: ARIA
lines.line: Be careful, Kael. We don't know what we're walking into." VISUAL CUE: Close-up of ARIA, her eyes filled with worry as she looks up at Kael.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of ARIA, expression intense and focused.
